channel.title: D&D
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: Gala Murder
item.description:
Known TimelineWe got picked up by Silsby's Cousin, Roger Astrid tells Ghost stories story Roger gets stop by guards and we have to get Id check apparently the guards are fans of the tournament (this is before our press meeting so the photos are ye ye ass) i high roll intimidation but apparently LOW ROLL EVERYTHING ELSE (I FAILED 2 STEALTH CHECKS, 1 DEX SAVE, AND 1 STR SAVE!?!?) yehaw the farm Silsby's sister wakes us with a rooster (we slept to 2pm) Silsby's Dad Casey calls the rest of the family, we eat a dinner table We hear about the Gala for the first time, It has the guest of honor as The Prince of Altheria we get formally invited because we are the paradise champs and WE GET A BUDGET TO BUY SHIT! Formal wear. We get taken to the [1]Outer Ring at the Fancy District where the Gala gets held. We GOT 35 GOLD PIECES WHAT THE FUCK Cyra was the equivalent of California i.e. Gold Rush.
Silsby has to head to Gala and leaves, while Elle immediately gravitates to the [2]tailor. We enter the tailor, Vibes: Immaculate, Jules: Definitely Gay, we get taken to the VIP area. We get to design/describe our outfit.
Noble gossip: a shit ton of nobles are [3]FUCKED if this deal goes through We get our outfits picked out and we have time to waste as the Tailors sew it together (and the makeup crew gets ready)... and also this took ALL OF OUR FUCKING GOLD! (im broke as fuck) Adler: Finds a souvenir shop Elle: What she wanted to find was elsewhere so nothing happens Aspen: Goes to weapons shop and observes the archery equipment Lenz: go around watering plants I find. Astrid: SNOOPING AS USUAL I SEE (went to a military bar and overheard info about the discouraged soldiers)
We head back to Julie Andrew's and get our clothes and [4]makeup- L: AM I THE ONLY ONE WITH SHORT HAIR?!?! all but L: yes. We head to the Palace and the gate is made of FUCKING GOLD?! We get poured a drink and toast. A person in a red dress (Yara) approaches us, welcomes us, and is was going to tells us who we are allowed to talk to. BUT THEN a girl walks up (Caldowin) to talk to Yara about Duke "most eligible bachelor" Moonbright coming in THE DUKE IS VINCE THE VAMPIRE! *WHAT THE FUC-* i mean Duke Vincent Moonbright is here and is currently overstimulated by a shit ton of women. Moonbright (city) is known for the best steel (specifically Moonbright Steel) through out and thusly making the Moonbright Family the most powerful family currently and since the King of has Rulez Thorpe, SON OF THE PORT MASTER, is in attendance His dad is in the Final Port, a maximum security, Kaida, Prince of Gusa, meets us and brought the "Pride". of a band called "7 Deadly Sins". We hear through Kidaf that Axel is interested in the tournament. Everything quiets down as the queen enters, to talk. Note "Cyra is a place forged in flame" They have a fire that they place a log in that hasn't died. The princes seem like close friends (every Player wants Yaoi)
[5]The Altheria prince (Lesle) is shocked as THE CYRA PRINCE (Axel) PROPOSED TO AN ALTHERIAN PRINCESS (Molly)?! (OH BOY THAT'S A LOVE TRIANGLEEEE) Kidaf, the eccentric, takes us to a secret party (which he not supposed to do). we love this guy so much already Axel really likes us wtf. WE GET SILSBY OUT OF WORK VIA CONNECTIONS! we have confirmation that Cyra We drink (we are underage) We go out and enjoy the firework showSILSBY SAYS THE THING!!! "THAT'S HOW WE DO IT IN CYRA"A commotion is out in the hall.Welcome to the murder mystery. From what we saw, Law (Lesley) was holding the knife
go to Gala Murder & Investiagtion for notes
Importance of the Gala
Cyra Layout
Silsby's family
Cyra Layout↩︎
Julie Andrew's ↩︎
Importance of the Gala↩︎
Elle was very excited↩︎
oh don't worry, i would be shocked too if my homeboy dated what was supposed to be MY bride↩︎ a very CYRA ChristmasEnchanted, Stained with Bird's BloodDEAD FALCON found in: PLANTEvadora's GlassBird freaked out, Knocked down Glass.Bird Killed by suspectFireworks go offGlass poisionedAxel StonedAvador, Pride (Pyrus)KaidaEach Hallway connected with every otherParadise Students (Us)Gloves: Evadora, Vince, Law, Caldowin, RulisEvadora was in charge of FireworksLaw is crying like a motherfuckerThorpe's Family is completely ruined from the arrest of his father Thorpe Evadora Yara (Didn't Put Guards up) Pride (Possibly) She Poisoned Axel's glass with the stone potion that turns him into a stone statue and scuffles with the birdRulius
People already in the room: Law, Vince, Caldewin, Yara.Kaida, the eccentric he is, drinks the poison glass and makes an accusation. He is now stone.Axel: is frozen in stone. He seems that he was drinking something
a very CYRA ChristmasWe ask: What happened after the toast? He says: Fireworks went off, He realizes Axel isn't there and goes to the office. Order of entrance according to him: Law, Vince, Caldowin, Yara. Yara pulls out the guns which scares CaldowinSilsby calls us over, and tells us to ask about the start of the day/gala.Arrives at 11:13pm Goes to greet Axel Axel was talking to evadora Was Reminiscing, in corridors Overheard argument with Law with Evadora about a "Pyrus".We ask: Start of today till now?Altherian ship 2:30pm Meet Axel @ palace at the gate 2:45pm Molly, Rulilus went with Yara. Talks to Axel in his Study. Evercrest and Cyra Conflict. Vince disagrees to the APA. Learns that Molly and Axel is going to get marry HE WAS THE PERSON WHO HOOKED THEM UP. good for him :) Reason for shocked: Wasn't supposed to be annouced like that. Rulius looks upset and Law brings him into his quarters. Main gala thing Fireworks Heard Glass Shattering Went to Law's room and saw the frozen Axel Didn't see bird but saw the Cage.Arrived at 1pm - Evadora meet her, talked to her for while. Kida is a "dear" and they gossiped in the Garden. Kida complement Caldowin's necklace. Saw Evadora guiding the staff Caldowin does her makeup and goes to the ballroom. Meets up with us and goes to see The Duke Vince. Had to take care of something (left something in her "purse"), The thing is left in the study... Was going to scream but got told to shut the fuck up by Vince. Vince looked angry at Law. Yara walks in, sees the scene pulls out the guns, Caldowin screams because of that.Purse: (according to her) Makeup and personal items...Father -> The General10am - Meet with Evadora since she went to live abroad. As Training was put in charge for Security When the Altherians came, She went to greet them. Formally introduced to Rulisus Thrope. Molly and Rulis went to the guest rooms. Guest Rooms are all in the same hallway. Checks with Axel to finds out Molly is there with him. Axel seems down in the dumps He says he wanted to sign the APA but some of his friends would get screwed over by it. She isn't a fan of the APA because she feels like Cyra should handle their own problems. Suspects Thrope.Thrope disappeared during the fireworks. She hears Vince screaming at Caldowin Goes to the study.2:35pm - Arrived, saw a hooded figure (Yara)Went to go to talk with Evadora, but got a door slammed in his face. Law found the gloomy Thorpe and brought him in his chambers to comfort him. Followed Law during the Gala. Brought to the Party (he was unaware of it). Saw the fireworks but had to use the bathroom. When he came back, He went into the study and witness the stone body of Axel in the study.Hired to fireworks and events. Was away to do Natural Study but took a semester off to help with the family business. 1:15pm - Yara went to go talk to a "friend" worked on the firework display. Caldowin looked upset at something. (gossip thing?) Went downstairs to get a drink, came back and Axel is dead.Broke off the marriage because it was arranged and the prision. Supports the APAMeet Kida when first performing. Got picked up by the 7 Deadly Sins Got invited after touring. Ran into Vince yelling at Axel Walked around with Kida.APA: don't fuck with politicscalls out Caldowin's necklace for being fake, got upset. He went back to his room until the gala, Talked to many people and us.WAS TOO BUSY, DIDN'T GET TO TAKE NOTES.
Gala MurderInvestiagtionRulius and Caldowin/Evadora which had an engagement that fell through
#AVCC

item.title: Silsby's family
item.description: Silsby Casey - Father (i didn't catch that) - Mother Roger - Cousin (i didn't catch that) - Sister learned only from #AVCC

item.title: S5 recap
item.description:
previously (techincally): AVCCInterrupted Testing Battle in archives: Aspen heard the higher-ups' conversation Aspen kills Trace other twin still alivewe get in troubleTrace's body was skewered on the Pegasus statue Gym teacher evil probablywe found a note: If you want to protect this deal, continue plan A. Take this period to regroup and solidify the code. The final piece was retrieved; her sacrifice was not in vain. You will get what you want. Have the user practice this version. Make sure the message gets to Aan. Adler: Aan = bad boy™tournament time :Popening ceremony interviewing corridor adler (the dumbass) gets forced to tell the truth (spilled almost everything) we did damage control game explaination Aspen finds Heme gave hint: "open" GUY'S NIGHT :Dque session
Session 5 Notes

item.title: Investiagtion
item.description:
a very CYRA ChristmasWe ask: What happened after the toast? He says: Fireworks went off, He realizes Axel isn't there and goes to the office. Order of entrance according to him: Law, Vince, Caldowin, Yara. Yara pulls out the guns which scares CaldowinSilsby calls us over, and tells us to ask about the start of the day/gala.Arrives at 11:13pm Goes to greet Axel Axel was talking to evadora Was Reminiscing, in corridors Overheard argument with Law with Evadora about a "Pyrus".We ask: Start of today till now?Altherian ship 2:30pm Meet Axel @ palace at the gate 2:45pm Molly, Rulilus went with Yara. Talks to Axel in his Study. Evercrest and Cyra Conflict. Vince disagrees to the APA. Learns that Molly and Axel is going to get marry HE WAS THE PERSON WHO HOOKED THEM UP. good for him :) Reason for shocked: Wasn't supposed to be annouced like that. Rulius looks upset and Law brings him into his quarters. Main gala thing Fireworks Heard Glass Shattering Went to Law's room and saw the frozen Axel Didn't see bird but saw the Cage.Arrived at 1pm - Evadora meet her, talked to her for while. Kida is a "dear" and they gossiped in the Garden. Kida complement Caldowin's necklace. Saw Evadora guiding the staff Caldowin does her makeup and goes to the ballroom. Meets up with us and goes to see The Duke Vince. Had to take care of something (left something in her "purse"), The thing is left in the study... Was going to scream but got told to shut the fuck up by Vince. Vince looked angry at Law. Yara walks in, sees the scene pulls out the guns, Caldowin screams because of that.Purse: (according to her) Makeup and personal items...Father -> The General10am - Meet with Evadora since she went to live abroad. As Training was put in charge for Security When the Altherians came, She went to greet them. Formally introduced to Rulisus Thrope. Molly and Rulis went to the guest rooms. Guest Rooms are all in the same hallway. Checks with Axel to finds out Molly is there with him. Axel seems down in the dumps He says he wanted to sign the APA but some of his friends would get screwed over by it. She isn't a fan of the APA because she feels like Cyra should handle their own problems. Suspects Thrope.Thrope disappeared during the fireworks. She hears Vince screaming at Caldowin Goes to the study.2:35pm - Arrived, saw a hooded figure (Yara)Went to go to talk with Evadora, but got a door slammed in his face. Law found the gloomy Thorpe and brought him in his chambers to comfort him. Followed Law during the Gala. Brought to the Party (he was unaware of it). Saw the fireworks but had to use the bathroom. When he came back, He went into the study and witness the stone body of Axel in the study.Hired to fireworks and events. Was away to do Natural Study but took a semester off to help with the family business. 1:15pm - Yara went to go talk to a "friend" worked on the firework display. Caldowin looked upset at something. (gossip thing?) Went downstairs to get a drink, came back and Axel is dead.Broke off the marriage because it was arranged and the prision. Supports the APAMeet Kida when first performing. Got picked up by the 7 Deadly Sins Got invited after touring. Ran into Vince yelling at Axel Walked around with Kida.APA: don't fuck with politicscalls out Caldowin's necklace for being fake, got upset. He went back to his room until the gala, Talked to many people and us.WAS TOO BUSY, DIDN'T GET TO TAKE NOTES.
Gala Murder

item.title: Importance of the Gala
item.description: Attended by prominate figures. Altheria holds the sea and has the best of the Navy and arrest a lot of criminals BUT these criminals/pirates mainly seem to arise from Cyra. Prince Axel (our age), Prince of Altheria, was sent to attend the Gala due to having a "friendship" with the prince of Cyra. Cyra Port Master was found out to be working with pirates. IF THE DEAL IS SIGNED, SHIT GOES DOWN. Due to the Altherinan Prince attending, Some people in Cyra may try to do something Yara (i think that's how it's spelled) is the General's child and is working security at the event. Altheria runs the APA which if joined allows Altheria to arrest any of your citizens they catch doing illegal behavior. Cyra is most likely to be the first sign the APA. If Cyra signs, Evercrest is most likely to sign. Gala Murder

item.title: Cyra Layout
item.description: Inner Ring - Royal Palace Outer Ring - middle class Outer Crust - Silsby and Family lives there.

item.title: a very CYRA Christmas
item.description:
We got picked up by Silsby's Cousin, Roger Astrid tells Ghost stories story Roger gets stop by guards and we have to get Id check apparently the guards are fans of the tournament (this is before our press meeting so the photos are ye ye ass) i high roll intimidation but apparently LOW ROLL EVERYTHING ELSE (I FAILED 2 STEALTH CHECKS, 1 DEX SAVE, AND 1 STR SAVE!?!?) yehaw the farm Silsby's sister wakes us with a rooster (we slept to 2pm) Silsby's Dad Casey calls the rest of the family, we eat a dinner table We hear about the Gala for the first time, It has the guest of honor as The Prince of Altheria we get formally invited because we are the paradise champs and WE GET A BUDGET TO BUY SHIT! Formal wear. We get taken to the [1]Outer Ring at the Fancy District where the Gala gets held. We GOT 35 GOLD PIECES WHAT THE FUCK Cyra was the equivalent of California i.e. Gold Rush.
Silsby has to head to Gala and leaves, while Elle immediately gravitates to the [2]tailor. We enter the tailor, Vibes: Immaculate, Jules: Definitely Gay, we get taken to the VIP area. We get to design/describe our outfit.
Noble gossip: a shit ton of nobles are [3]FUCKED if this deal goes through We get our outfits picked out and we have time to waste as the Tailors sew it together (and the makeup crew gets ready)... and also this took ALL OF OUR FUCKING GOLD! (im broke as fuck) Adler: Finds a souvenir shop Elle: What she wanted to find was elsewhere so nothing happens Aspen: Goes to weapons shop and observes the archery equipment Lenz: go around watering plants I find. Astrid: SNOOPING AS USUAL I SEE (went to a military bar and overheard info about the discouraged soldiers)
We head back to Julie Andrew's and get our clothes and [4]makeup- L: AM I THE ONLY ONE WITH SHORT HAIR?!?! all but L: yes. We head to the Palace and the gate is made of FUCKING GOLD?! We get poured a drink and toast. A person in a red dress (Yara) approaches us, welcomes us, and is was going to tells us who we are allowed to talk to. BUT THEN a girl walks up (Caldowin) to talk to Yara about Duke "most eligible bachelor" Moonbright coming in THE DUKE IS VINCE THE VAMPIRE! *WHAT THE FUC-* i mean Duke Vincent Moonbright is here and is currently overstimulated by a shit ton of women. Moonbright (city) is known for the best steel (specifically Moonbright Steel) through out and thusly making the Moonbright Family the most powerful family currently and since the King of has Rulez Thorpe, SON OF THE PORT MASTER, is in attendance His dad is in the Final Port, a maximum security, Kaida, Prince of Gusa, meets us and brought the "Pride". of a band called "7 Deadly Sins". We hear through Kidaf that Axel is interested in the tournament. Everything quiets down as the queen enters, to talk. Note "Cyra is a place forged in flame" They have a fire that they place a log in that hasn't died. The princes seem like close friends (every Player wants Yaoi)
[5]The Altheria prince (Lesle) is shocked as THE CYRA PRINCE (Axel) PROPOSED TO AN ALTHERIAN PRINCESS (Molly)?! (OH BOY THAT'S A LOVE TRIANGLEEEE) Kidaf, the eccentric, takes us to a secret party (which he not supposed to do). we love this guy so much already Axel really likes us wtf. WE GET SILSBY OUT OF WORK VIA CONNECTIONS! we have confirmation that Cyra We drink (we are underage) We go out and enjoy the firework showSILSBY SAYS THE THING!!! "THAT'S HOW WE DO IT IN CYRA"A commotion is out in the hall.Welcome to the murder mystery. From what we saw, Law (Lesley) was holding the knife
go to Gala Murder & Investiagtion for notes

Cyra Layout
Silsby's family

Julie Andrew's ↩︎

Elle was very excited↩︎
oh don't worry, i would be shocked too if my homeboy dated what was supposed to be MY bride↩︎

item.title: Session 5 Notes
item.description:
Elle is magically ill so unable to compete right now. so we get guy's night part 2We strategize thru the night arrangement: Who would be best:
Silsby (in both lists of long distance and fighter) Deliah (Healer) Vince The Vampire (Prince + Smart) Heme (complete unknown, bloodsew's daughter. Wild Magician, literally gamba) Astrid's Roommate Best Relationship
Silsby (refer to a very CYRA Christmas)
Vince (Blackmailable (blame Q) , refer to a very CYRA Christmas) Cherry Fayepheria (Figher first healer second) Deliah (Saved Aspen's ass that one time) Heme (could genuinely kill us ngl) Kite (cheerleader...) we go eepWe get makeup done and stuffWe talk to the possible candidates in the order of: Kite (interested so we good) Silsby (rather not cuz family) Vince (We make allegiance w/ him before we leave) We get Kite due to recommendation :D Selma is confused as all hell lol Go through the plan with Kite and Selmalet's get this fuckin duboh fuck they held a ceremony for trace (person we kinda killed)1st riddle: It is the beginning of eternity the end of time & space the end of1st puzzle simplified: ETERITY BEGIN TIME END END SPACE p1 answer: it's all fuckin "e"puzzle 2: in unity, there's strength in joining, there's might we stand together ready to we fight what am i?p2 answer: alliance
(insert alot of cool puzzles here)kite (~20L) and i (8L) sacrificed blood (max health) to progresswe got da egg (answer was "open")da rules reprise: each egg is worth 1 point (each team has one) you need the egg to exit if you don't have an egg, no point and no leaving (bwoomp) you get points per phase, the total will be added we get jumped and combat starts (we are pretending that adler can use magic for his sake) i immediately get downed aspen revives me Adler rages and taunts oppenent Astrid attempts to activate gauntlets, fails. i immediately heal Adler and poison spray the opponent in what can be described as a popoff Kite goes bonkers (evil smoke thing aka bbeg. by this point i think the whole fuckin athletics team is evil/possessed/cursed) we run for the exit while kite fights bard dude (who used "friends" or smth to leak classified info) aspen is now a bear opp steals orb last second 4 out of 5 of our team is in the elevator except bear aspen who is now alone and fighting for the egg and escape.
